[[General/Legends|General]] '''Krax''' was the leader of the [[Troob]] people of [[Tahlboor]] around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]]. His wife was [[Stigrit Krax]] and his son was [[Ket Krax]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
